commands.review_summary:
The branch changes shared reply dispatch, ACP delivery, gateway message.action mirroring, and Telegram message-context handling to defer waits and move direct typing earlier, with focused tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is attached. Source inspection does confirm current main waits on dispatcher idle after direct block replies and waits on transcript mirroring before message.action returns, while the PR’s tests simulate those latency paths.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of async delivery/transcript timing, not a narrow repair ClawSweeper can safely queue.

target.title: [perf] improve reply send performance
target.body:
## Summary
- improve reply latency by avoiding dispatcher-idle waits on every direct block reply callback
- flush pending block delivery only before subsequent tool/progress events, preserving block-before-tool ordering
- keep ACP direct block replies non-blocking while preserving visible reply chronology
- schedule source reply transcript mirroring after successful `message.action` sends without blocking the gateway response
- serialize async source transcript mirrors per session so same-session transcript chronology is preserved
- send Telegram direct-message typing once access has passed, before later context/session construction can delay the indicator, while avoiding a duplicate immediate cue

## Root Cause
Recent reply-path changes moved delivery bookkeeping into hot paths for lightweight replies: block callbacks waited for dispatcher idle, and `message.action` waited for transcript mirroring after platform delivery. Under concurrent embedded runs, cron work, or slow channel/transcript I/O, this amplified reply latency and event-loop starvation. The 36-54h window also includes Telegram dispatch replay dedupe changes that added work before the existing typing cue path.

## Impact
Simple visible replies can return sooner without compromising user-visible send order. The existing block-before-tool/progress ordering guarantee is preserved by flushing only when later progress is about to be emitted. Transcript mirroring remains best-effort and still runs after successful source-conversation sends, with per-session ordering to avoid mirrored transcript reordering. Telegram direct typing starts earlier after authorization without sending an extra duplicate initial cue.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-delivery.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
